name: Praevian
lore: Praevians are the keeper of the Legion’s bound automata, those soulless machines sworn to the Legion’s service and inducted into their ranks as honorary Legionaries after decades of service. Initiated into the rites of the Mechanicum’s Cybernetica Techarcana, these officers oversee the maintenance and programming of their charges and ensure that loyalty to the Legion and its traditions are enshrined in their core logic. On the field of battle, they march at the forefront of the inducted maniples, guiding them in the correct prosecution of war and acting as examples of true sons of the Legion.

wargearOptions.description: This Model may have its bolt pistol exchanged for one item from the Legion Pistols list.
This Model may have melta bombs selected for it for +5 Points.
